title: Part Time Swimming Instructor
description:
Swim2u Swim School – Join Our Team as a Swim Coach!

(SME 500 Awarded by Singapore ATC)

📌 Company Registration No: 202425610C

Are you passionate about swimming and looking to develop a rewarding career? We are hiring dedicated individuals to join our team as Swim Teachers!

Why Join Us?

✔️ Gain valuable skills and hands-on experience.
✔️ Flexible teaching hours and locations based on your preference.
✔️ Students will be assigned to you near your area.
✔️ Competitive earning potential – earn a minimum of $35 per lesson (30 or 45 mins), with payouts at the end of every month.

Role & Responsibilities:

🏊 Engage, coach, and inspire students of all ages to achieve their swimming goals.
🏊 Conduct one-to-one lessons or group classes.
🏊 Create a fun and engaging learning environment tailored to individual needs.

Training & Certification:

📅 Duration: 3-4 weeks (may vary based on individual progress).
🎓 Obtain a recognized swimming coach certification from any certified body (Such as Swim School International (SSI) or NROC) to start teaching.
🎯 Once certified, the school will assign students to you.

Who Can Apply?

🔹 Anyone interested in learning and committed to becoming a swim coach.
🔹 Candidates who hold an instructor certification but have no prior coaching experience may still apply.

🔹 Those without certification are encouraged to attend training from any recognized certification body such as (Swim School International (SSI) or NROC) before applying.

postedCompany.description:
Swim2u Pte. Ltd.


About Us:

Swim2u Pte. Ltd. is a leading provider of swimming lessons and aquatic programs in Singapore. Founded in 2021, we have grown from a small swim school into a comprehensive aquatic education provider, offering a wide range of services tailored to all age groups and skill levels. Our mission is to promote water safety, physical fitness, and lifelong swimming skills through high-quality instruction and personalized coaching.


Our Services:

- Learn-to-Swim Programs: We offer structured swim classes for infants, children, and adults, ensuring a safe and enjoyable learning experience.

- Private Swimming Lessons: Personalized one-on-one instruction tailored to individual needs and goals.

- Group Classes: Fun and engaging group sessions that foster teamwork and social interaction.

- Specialized Training: Advanced courses for competitive swimmers and certifications for aspiring swim instructors.


Our Team:

Our team comprises highly qualified and certified swimming instructors, personal trainers, and rehab specialists dedicated to providing exceptional service. We prioritize safety, with all activities supervised by experienced professionals who are passionate about teaching and promoting a healthy lifestyle.


Why Join Us:

At Swim2u Pte. Ltd., we believe in fostering a supportive and dynamic work environment. We provide our employees with opportunities for professional growth, continuous training, and career advancement. Join us to make a difference in the community by promoting aquatic education and healthy living.


Job Opportunities:

We are always looking for dedicated professionals to join our team. If you are passionate about swimming and fitness, and eager to contribute to a growing company, explore our current job openings and become a part of the Swim2u family.


Contact Us:

For more information about our programs and career opportunities, visit our website at [www.swim2u.sg](http://www.swim2u.sg) or contact us at info@swim2u.sg.


Join Swim2u Pte. Ltd. today and be a part of a team that is making waves in the world of aquatic education!
postedCompany.name: SWIM2U PTE. LTD.
